description: Evidence reporting whether the m=1 kink mode is stable in helical or rotating Z-pinch settings at moderate Mach-Alfven number. Value 1 = stable, 0 = unstable / persists.

open_questions.question: Which of the 6 surviving tension(s) in this group are real disagreements vs. extraction or comparability artifacts?

open_questions.question: Are the implicit-headline claim(s) A_01, A_04, A_06, A_07 actually intended to generalize across this group, or do their authors scope them more narrowly than the propagator assumes?

suggested_next_steps.description: Read each implicit-headline claim's source paper and decide whether to add explicit out-of-regime predictions or to mark the claim as scoped only to its home regime.
